<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart-bash-255" location="lines:255-258" -->
```bash
  # Query parties endpoint to verify party exists
  curl -f -sS "http://localhost:2975/v2/parties?parties=$PARTY_ID" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $LEDGER_TOKEN"

```
